jp.title: これが「最初の道の駅？」 パーキングエリアじゃん！ “高速道路みたいな一般道”で38年 高速PAから“失われつつあるもの”がここに

jp.title: 18日・19日は今回の暑さのピークで猛暑日か 20日頃からまるで梅雨 2週間天気
jp.description: 18日(月)と19日(火)は広く晴れて、今回の暑さのピークとなるでしょう。広く真夏日(最高気温30℃以上)となり、全国で今年初の猛暑日(最高気温35℃以上)となる所もありそうです。一転して20日(水)以降は前線の影響で、本州付近は雨の降る日が多くなるでしょう。

world.title: WHO convenes partners to strengthen Ebola response in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
world.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) is building a better future for people everywhere. Health lays the foundation for vibrant and productive communities, stronger economies, safer nations and a better world. Our work touches lives around the world every day – often in invisible ways. As the lead health authority within the United Nations (UN) system, we help ensure the safety of the air we breathe, the food we eat, the water we drink and the medicines and vaccines that treat and protect us. The Organization aims to provide every child, woman and man with the best chance to lead a healthier, longer life.

world.title: FG launches podcast to amplify children’s voices
world.description: The federal government has launched ‘FutureNow’, a podcast designed to give Nigerian children and adolescents a space to share their experiences and contribute to national discourse.

world.description: Bulgaria took the crown, but the most dramatic moment came when Israel's entry -ranked low by juries- shot to first place after the public vote, triggering a massive chorus of boos.
